title: Reflection Positivity as EML-2 Depth Constraint

analysis.object: T822: Reflection Positivity as EML-2 Depth Constraint depth analysis

reflection_positivity_defn.description: OS3: <f, Theta(f)> >= 0 for all f in A^+

lattice_rp.description: Lattice: reflection positivity holds for Wilson action (proved by Osterwalder-Seiler 1978)

berkovich_rp.description: Under Berkovich analytification: positivity is preserved (analytification is a ring map preserving order)

formal_rp.description: Formal GAGA preserves positivity: formal scheme inherits positivity from completed ring

continuum_rp.description: Continuum: reflection positivity transfers from lattice via descent chain

rp_from_descent.description: Reflection positivity = EML-2 condition. Descent preserves EML-2 (T762: EML-2 conditions transfer). Lattice RP -> continuum RP.
rp_from_descent.reason: T822: RP transfers automatically via descent

t822_theorem.description: T822: Reflection positivity is EML-2. Descent preserves EML-2 conditions (T762). Lattice RP (proved, Osterwalder-Seiler) transfers to continuum RP via Berkovich descent. OS3 is automatically satisfied. T822.
t822_theorem.reason: Reflection positivity FREE via descent. T822.

analysis.theorem: T822: Reflection Positivity as EML-2 Depth Constraint (S1101).

key_theorem: T822: Reflection Positivity as EML-2 Depth Constraint (S1101).
